content.en:
"2,000,000 source stones!"

"3,000,000 Source Stones!"

"3.2 million source stones from the other side!"

A Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor made his own offer.

Suddenly.

An Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor came and offered his own price: "3.8 million Origin Stones from the other side!"

"Lord of the Bloody Night!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He didn't have a good impression of this guy, although he took over the Xiao family's mission and also benefited from that mission.

But this guy of the Lord of the Blood Night probed his body and spied on him secretly for the sake of the purple ruin crystal on the other side.

If it weren't for his lack of strength, he would have been eager to kill the other party.

"4,000,000 source stones!"

Ye Tian also made a bid.

The Lord of the Blood Night took a look at Ye Tian and naturally recognized Ye Tian.

However, he didn't think that Ye Tian could compare to his financial resources.

Soon.

Their asking price has risen to 5 million source stones, which is a bit high, and if they continue to shout, it will be a little unworthy.

"Lord of Endless, give me a face, you don't have to fight!"

The Lord of the Blood Night transmitted a message to Ye Tian and said.

"Lord of the Bloody Night, if you quit if you don't have enough Source Stones on the other side, what do you mean by letting me not fight?"

Ye Tian didn't transmit the sound, and said it directly.

These words made many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors look at the Lord of the Blood Night, they didn't dare to offend an Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, they didn't speak, but the meaning expressed in their eyes was obvious.

"Endless Lord, you ......"

The Lord of the Bloody Night was annoyed.

I knew that I should have secretly killed Ye Tian in the first place, and then check if Ye Tian had any purple ruin crystals on the other side.

"Humph!"

He snorted coldly and left.

And this Nine Realms True Source Fruit will belong to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian took out the source stone of the other side, he took this Nine Realms True Source Fruit with him.

In the following days, Ye Tian also traded some good things that he needed, but he had not yet discovered the treasures that could help him quickly break through the origin rules of the other side to the ninety-two-tier realm.

After all, who would take out such precious resources easily!

Those treasures are almost all bartered, and it is only possible to see them when the trade fair officially begins.

Now it's all about appetizers!

...

this day.

The Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors had finally arrived, and the fair had just officially begun.

At this time, a lot of good things will also be traded.

Ye Tian wandered around the Xuanyin Giant City, hoping to come across the treasures he needed.

There are all kinds of small auctions here, and he has differentiated into many small auctions, but many of the things sold at the auction are not of high grade, mainly to improve the origin of the other side.

Some can even improve the origin of the Origin Upper Realm, but for the Origin Middle Realm, it is wasteful to use, and the value is too high.

He bought a few treasures that would help improve the origin of the other side, and after spending a lot of money, he didn't continue to buy them.

If you buy it again, it will be in vain.

He only wanted to buy treasures that could help him break the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side now.

And he quickly found it.

A major auction.

One of the Origin Upper Realm is sitting here, and there are a few Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

The auctions here are relatively high-end, and they are all origins who go up to the realm to take out their treasures for auction, or exchange them for the treasures they need.

At this time, an Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor took out a piece of bone.

Some people didn't know the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor of this skeleton, and some didn't think about it, thinking that it was at most the skeleton of a Origin Upper Realm powerhouse, but it was actually of little value.

However, the Origin Origin Realm still recognized it.

"This is a skeleton of the Origin Ancestral Beast, I just don't know if there is still an origin left in it?"

One of the Origin Ascenders said.

The Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who took out this Origin Ancestral Beast Skeleton said, "This is indeed a Origin Ancestral Beast Skeleton, and there is still a small amount of Origin in it. For the Heavenly Ancestor whose Origin Rules have reached the realm of Ninety Percent and Two Realms above, it is not very useful, but for Heavenly Ancestors who are below the Ninety Percent Origin Rules Realm on the other side, this is a good thing. I also got it by accident, and now it's bartering, and you can make a price as you like. If I'm satisfied, I'll make a deal with him. "

"Origin Beast Bones!"

Ye Tian had also heard of the Origin Ancestral Beast, which was a legendary creature in the land of eternity, and its birth was comparable to the existence of the Origin Upper Realm, which could absorb the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

It is full of treasures, and the bones also contain a special origin, and understanding its origin can greatly improve the origin rules of the other side, and the value is unimaginable.

If you want to kill a Origin Ancestor Beast, it is too difficult.

And the Origin Ancestor Beast is too rare, and there are not many Origin Ancestor Beasts from ancient times to the present.

The most recent Origin Ancestor Beast was still at the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level, and many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors besieged it, and it also fell nearly ten Origin Origin Upper Realm before it was finally besieged.

I don't know how many billions of primeval epochs have passed since this matter, and many of the materials of the Origin Ancestor Beast have also been used, but I didn't expect that there would be such a piece of Origin Ancestor Beast bones containing the origin in the world.

Although there is not much of a source, the value is also high.

Subsequently.

One of the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors quoted a high price, but none of them made these Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors excited.

Then.

Ye Tian also quoted.

"Eighty thousand pieces of ruin god gold!"

Ye Tiandao.

The eighty thousand pieces of Ruin God Gold made that Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor feel moved, because the Ruin God Gold was really useful to him.

He happened to condense an inferior treasure from the other side, if there were 80,000 pieces of ruin god gold, then he could upgrade it to a medium eternal treasure!

Thereupon.

He didn't want to wait, and said directly to Ye Tian: "This Heavenly Ancestor, I am willing to use this Origin Ancestral Beast Bone to trade with you for 80,000 pieces of Ruin God Gold!"

Since Ye Tian was an incarnation, his copy body immediately rushed over and completed the transaction with this Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

In this way, this fragment of the Origin Ancestral Beast bone fell into his hands.

And Ye Tian's wealth and wealth also attracted the attention of many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Of course, they won't do anything, after all, Wind Tooth Island is not vegetarian either.

Soon after.

Ye Tian came across another good thing, its effect was still on the bones of this source ancestral beast, and it was also a treasure that could assist in improving the origin rules of the other side.

This treasure is called the Ancestral Tree Fruit on the Other Side.

In the middle of the land of the Eternal Shore, there is a sacred tree, called the Ancestral Tree of the Other Side, and a batch of Ancestral Trees of the Other Shore will be born every long time, which will be occupied by the top overlord-level forces in the middle of the country.

For a long time, there are very few ancestral trees left behind.

This time, it was one of the top overlord forces, the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, who took out one, ready to exchange it for the treasures he needed, if no one took out good things, then he would definitely not trade.
